name: Bangstick
description: A low-level Torgue shotgun built for simple, inexpensive use. It fires a single shell per trigger pull but offers little beyond basic explosive shotgun damage, so it is usually a stopgap weapon while leveling rather than something worth building around.
notes: It uses an unusual component layout compared with later, higher-grade Torgue shotguns, which helps explain its weaker overall stats and handling.
